acceptance_targets: [CH1-PROSE-RECURRING-FORMULA-APHORISM-005] PASS if no more than one of those three locations retains the same two-sentence aphoristic closure shape; FAIL if two or more still use the identical paired-short-declarative cadence.

[CH1-PROSE-RECURRING-FORMULA-ONCE-GESTURE-006] PASS if within those four target lines the word 'once' appears in at most one gesture beat after revision; FAIL if two or more gesture beats still rely on the same 'once' template.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than one of those three locations retains the same two-sentence aphoristic closure shape; FAIL if two or more still use the identical paired-short-declarative cadence.
findings.evidence: Repeated two-beat aphoristic closure pattern appears multiple times: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:97; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:349; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:367.
findings.problem: Recurring sentence-shape tic (paired short declaratives as thematic stamp) starts to feel formulaic rather than earned, flattening late-chapter musical variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise at least two of the beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:349, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:367 into structurally different closures (e.g., one sensory-embedded sentence, one action-anchored beat) while preserving meaning.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if within those four target lines the word 'once' appears in at most one gesture beat after revision; FAIL if two or more gesture beats still rely on the same 'once' template.
findings.evidence: Micro-gesture + 'once' construction repeats beyond stylistic coincidence: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:27; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:101; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:211; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:299.
findings.problem: Mechanical repetition: the same modifier pattern recurs enough to register as autopilot prose rather than intentional rhythm.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:27, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:211, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:299, vary at least three instances with non-'once' physical beats (or remove the beat where redundant) so gesture language stops clustering on one template.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
